description: Committed 'team baseline' synapse history for the onboarding-lift eval (E1.5). Each session is a group of files a teammate edited together in one sitting; replaying them through NeuralMind's real reinforcement path (activate_files) teaches the synapse graph cross-cutting associations that a purely textual search can't recover -- e.g. users/crud.py and db/connection.py are hubs touched alongside almost every feature even though the words 'authentication' or 'billing' never appear in them. An onboarded agent that inherits this memory should surface those co-edited hubs on its first queries; a cold agent cannot. Regenerable + transparent by design (no binary synapses.db): the harness replays this deterministically. Mirrors tests/benchmark/run.py SYNAPSE_SESSIONS, committed here as the eval's fixed baseline.
